TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ye-lu-sa-len ŤÄ∂Ť∑ĮśííŚÜ∑ == likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Ye-lu-sa-len u Pa-le-se-tan kitidaan nu macimacian, Ye-se'-lea tatengan mikuwan tinatukayan palanuheni a suo-tu, ina Lin-he-kuo mimelaway tu Pa-le-se-tan kanatal saan nu Walian u suo-tu nu nika kanatal. sumamaday nu O-cuo a tademaw palatatelungan nu kitakid. Ye-lu-sa-len itida i Ti-cun-hay atu Se-hay a laa'dan, u aayaw nu likisi a kitakid nu tatelungan nu kiwkay, u kapahay a nipidiputan tu Ya-puo-la-han nu sinza nu sakalahat a tukayan. Ye-lu-sa-len tawya u Ya-puo-la-han nu kiwkay a angangangan. namaka kunyen nu ayawan tu cacay a bataan nu seci, Suo-luo-men patideng tu sayaway a kiwkayan, Ye-lu-sa-len u Yiw-tay-cia tatelungan nu sasasinzaan atu sailayay a tukay, tawya sailayay nu kiwkay a liwan nu cabeng, u Yiw-tay-cia sa kapahay a kitidaan. kahemek nu sinza ku Ye-lu-sa-len, sakamusa "bangcalay a cudad" idaw ku sulit, itida ci Ye-su malabades, tademen, maudipaca, tayda i tapukuan. Yi-se-lan-ciw padadanan ku Ye-lu-sa-len malaMay-cia, May-ti-na tu nikuda a saka tulu a kahemekan nu kitidaan, sapikineng ci Mu-han-muo-de a saculil tu labii, patideng tu kahemekan nu kiwkay i buyu nu tusaay a Cin-cen-se, A-ke'-lun-Cin-cen-se atu Yun-teng-Cen-cen-se sapikineng tina kawawan. namaka caysiwlimpic mahcaan sakatulu nu nikalepacawan nu Cung-tun nikuda, mikuwan ku Yi-se-len tu hamin nu Ye-lu-sa-len kitidaan, pasutipan Ye-lu-sa-len atu wali Ye-lu-sa-len, atu malumanay a tukay. Yi-se-lea atu Pa-le-se-tan kanatal sakamusa u Ye-lu-sa-len u nuheni a Suo-tu sa, Yiw-tay tademaw, sinza atu Mu-se-lin palutatengan ina kitidaan u nuheni a sakahemekan nu kiwkay sa. nika ninatusaay a kanatal itini i kitakid nu siakayan caay namin palutatengan tu nu henian. Ťá™1967 . saan ku katuuday nida dukay caay henay kaw tatengaay, masasuwalay henay ku Yi-se-lea atu Pa-le-se-tan. Hatidaay nu kanatal u Yi-se-lea ta-se-kun itida namin patideng i Te'-la-wi-hu. aydaay nu Ye-lu-sa-len u Yi-Pa kalawlawan a tatelungan. Yi-se-lea a sin-cen-ci itida i Ye-lu-sa-len kitidaan, ahebal makaala tu limnemtu pinhua-kun-li, caycay kiya kenisa a niyadu', u Ye-lu-sa-len kenisa a kitidaan. . imi nu kiwkayŚģóśēôśĄŹÁĺ© Ye-lu-sa-len u Yiw-tay-cyaw, Ci-tu-cyaw atu Yi-se-lan-cyaw, tabakiay nu kasenengan nu kiwkay. satabakien ku imi Yi-se-lan-cyaw atu Ci-tu-cyaw tademaw milawit tu kitakid a pakiw nu tademawan, Ye-lu-sa-len sisa malakakaadihan nu kitakiday a angangangan. Ye-lu-sa-len itini nu tuluay a Ya-puo-la-han kiwkay u Yiw-tay-cyaw, Ci-tu-cyaw atu Yi-se-lan-cyaw atu nu duma a adidiay nu kiwkayan. Tusepsepsep mihcaan idaw ku nipikizang tu mihcaan, Ye-lu-sa-len idaw ku caytusepsip a kiwkayan, caylimwal kiwkay atu piclu ku Cin-cen-se. nika Ye-lu-sa-len u kiwkay atu kiwkay sakalecad namin, yadah ku lawlaw, picidekan u seng-ten-buyu'. . namaka nu ayawan nu cacay a lasubu a se-cian, Su-luo-men-sen-tin "sayaway a sen-tin" itida i Ye-lu-sa-len patideng, Ye-lu-sa-len u Yiw-tay-cyaw palutatengaan a tatelungan atu sakasenengan a tukay. Ye-lu-sa-len misuayaw tu sakasenengan tu Yiw-tay-cyaw mahida tu caay ka sumad. kalawpesan nu Ye-lu-sa-len i nu ayawan idaw ku nisingaan tu bangcalay a cudad, u sakaetiman nu Yiw-tay-cyaw, u Ta-se-ci a cacay ku situngusay a micumud cacay a mihcaan kina cacay a micumud. Ťá™ŚĺěŚČć10šłĖÁīÄ, . u tatama nu Yi-se-ley nu cacayay a mihcaan a kinatulu a micumud i Ye-lu-sa-len " Yi-ye-cey, Cu-pun-cey, U-cen-cey", nu kiwkay a demiad.ayda, pulung nu kitakid a Yiw-tay kiwkay anu minulitu kanca pasayda i Ye-lu-sa-len, anu idaw ku nisikian tu luma' pasayda i Ye-lu-sa-len, pasaydan i tatelungan a kitidaan, kun-yen pitu a bataan mihcaan kiwkay tastasen nu Luo-ma a tademaw, u liwan satu i midihingay i nutipana a buyu'an. nutipan, malasaka tusa a matastasay a kiwkayan, sisa malaYiw-tay-cyaw sakasenengan nu kiwkayan a kakitidaan. . Ciw-lu kasikadan nu Ye-lu-sa-len, caay kaimalumanay a cudadan ku sasakamuen, saan i Ye-lu-sa-len u kalabadesan ni Ye-su, pitademan atu kahukacean nida. saan ci Ye-su anu miinuli sadihemayen ku balucu' atu utunasi, " caay kay tiniay a buyu', caay kay Ye-lu-sa-len". saan i hukuingngay a cuda. lecuhan ci Ye-su pataydaen tu i Ye-lu-sa-len, sabaw tusa ku mihcaan ni Ye-su miladay tu wama atu wina tayda i Ye-lu-sa-len midiput tu E'-ye-cye, i kalabadesan mikasaw tu kiwkay. itida ci Ye-su i Ye-lu-sa-len, tiya demiadan, tu sadikuday nida pilipayan a maudip. micumud tu Ye-lu-sa-len ci Ye-su sadikuday nu nikalabiay a kitidaan i Si-an-san, midepit ci Ta-wi wan ku lunem. Ilabu nu Ye-lu-sa-len idaw ku "kalabadesan a dadan" atu "kalabadesan tu sabaw sepat a dadan", mikineng ci Ye-suan nipimuku tu ziwzika muculil pasayda i tatabata. . ya kitidaan u pipacekan ci Ye-su tu ziwzikaan, itida i aydaay a lunem nu kiwkay, u malumanay a tukay a angangangan a kiwkay atu kilisetu tataydaan a kitidaan. itini i Ye-han-hukuing inakitidaan u Ye-lu-sa-len sa, ayda nipikinkiwan tina ke-ke-kitidaan u laa'd tu Ye-lu-sa-len malumanay a cabengan caay kaw mibataday, itini tu i tukayan. ŚźĄŚźĄšĽĖ, . Ye-lu-sa-len saan u sakatulu nu Yi-se-lan-cyaw a sakatulu nu tabakiay a kiwkayan. itini i May-cya, ina Ye-lu-sa-len u Mu-se-lin nu inulian a kitidaan. itini i nemtusep mihcaan ci Mu-han-muo-de tapuku nu labii "Mu-se-lin palutatengan ci Mu-han-muo-de itida i labii mahicaay kiya a namakayda i May-cya katukuh i Ye-lu-sa-len kiwkay, macakat taydan i tapukuan, masasuadih atu maluayaway a tademawan" nikuda, Ye-lu-sa-len kuwanen tu nu Mu-se-lin. itini i "ku-lan-cuda" saan sabaw pitu a balih nu sakacacay nisulitan Mu-han-muo-de salabisa muculil pasayda i Ye-lu-sa-len a kawawan, aydaay a Ye-lu-sa-len sen-san i pabaw tusa ku Cin-cen-se idaw ku nipikiningan ci Ye-suan, hacacay sa i Ku-lan-cin nasakamuan u A-ke'-sa' cin-cen-se', u Mu-se-lin palutatengan ci Mu-han-muo-de salabisa mikayakay a sapikayakay a ba'tuan itida i yen-din-cin-cen-se. . lalangawanśĖáŚĆĖ amica u Ye-lu-sa-len angangangan u kiwkay ku sakahemekan i kitakidan, nika nina tukayan idaw ku yadahay nu duma u nalimaan a lalangawan. Yi-se-lea pu-u-kun u Ye-lu-sa-len u tadaangangangan nu yi-su-puo-u-kun, tu mihmihcaan makaala tu cacay a wangan nu taydaay a midang, tulu nu cacayan namakaydaay namini i Yi-se-lea kanatal. 80,000 pin-hun-kun-ce puo-u-kun pasupinaay a yi-su-cikuo, u sasalusimetan namakacuwacuwaay a kitakidan nu kaw-ku-sya, nituktukan atu nalimaan a tuudan. ti-siw-puo-u-kun itda i tatelungan nu Ye-lu-sa-len, tada papadengan u Yi-se-lea yi-su-cia ci An-na.Ti-siw a nalimaan. . Yiw-tay pipacukan a kakiningan u Ye-se-lea a tademaw ku katuuday nu tataydan miadih, ilabu idaw ku satabakiay nu kitakidan a nikapapacukan a cudadan. puo-u-kun namakayda i Yiw-tay nakamuan tu nipipacukan. nu duma a puo-u-kun nipisingaan u lalimaan sa. tu mihmkhcaan nu kakiningan nu nipipacukan idaw tu ku tayniay mikining. Yiw-tay-papacukan a kakiningan u sapikinkiw atu sapakatineng a cikuo, nu tayniay a tademaw taneng misuayaw tu Yiw-tay sapipacukaw a kawaw mamidateng sa. . sakaudipÁ∂ďśŅü itini i likisi, miliyas ku Ye-lu-sa-len tu Yea-hua atu Cya-sa a anganganan nu minatu, sakaudip nu heni namakayda namini i nipicaw-sen i Ye-lu-sa-len a kikayan, ayda mahida tu u namakacuwacuwaay a tayniay nu micaw-senay, hatidaay tu nu tayniay a tademaw kanca miadih aca tu si-ceyn atu Ye-lu-sa-len a tukayan, nika namaka caysiwlimpic mihcaan, itini i Ye-lu-sa-len sakay sakaudip idaw t uku nikacakatan, cay kaw kiwkay a cacay ku tataydaan sa. ś≠∑ŚŹ≤šłä, .

mir~…ĺadaj tu wama atu wina tajda i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn midiput tu …ô Ē~ °-j…ô- ¶j…ô, i kar~…ĺabad…ôsan mikasaw tu kiwkaj. itida ¶i j…ô-su i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn, tija d…ômiadan, tu sadikudaj nida ziwzikaan, itida i ajdaaj a r~…ĺun…ôm nu kiwkaj, u mar~…ĺumanaj a tukaj a aŇčaŇčaŇčan a kiwkaj atu kir~…ĺis…ôtu tatajdaan a kitidaan. itini i j…ô-ńßan-ńßukuiŇč inakitidaan u j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn sa, ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw a sakatur~…ĺu nu tabakiaj a kiwkajan. itini i maj- ¶ja, ina j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn u mu-s…ô-r~…ĺin nu inur~…ĺian a kitidaan. itini i n…ômtus…ôp mińß ¶aan ¶i mu-ńßan-muo-d…ô tapuku nu r~…ĺabii "mu-s…ô-r~…ĺin par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ¶i mu-ńßan-muo-d…ô itida i r~…ĺabii mańßi ¶aaj kija a namakajda i maj- ¶ja katukuńß i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn kiwkaj, ma ¶akat tajdan i tapukuan, masasuadińß atu mar~…ĺuajawaj a tad…ômawan" nikuda, j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn kuwan…ôn tu nu mu-s…ô-r~…ĺin. itini i "ku-r~…ĺan- ¶uda" saan sabaw pitu a bar~…ĺińß nu saka ¶a ¶aj nisur~…ĺitan mu-ńßan-muo-d…ô sar~…ĺabisa mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ pasajda i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn a kawawan, ajdaaj a j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn s…ôn-san i pabaw tusa ku ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô idaw ku nipikiniŇčan ¶i j…ô-suan, ńßa ¶a ¶aj sa i ku-r~…ĺan- ¶in nasakamuan u a-k…ô Ē~ °-sa Ē~ ° ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô Ē~ °, u mu-s…ô-r~…ĺin par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ¶i mu-ńßan-muo-d…ô sar~…ĺabisa mikajakaj a sapikajakaj a ba Ē~ °tuan itida i j…ôn-din- ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô. . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan** ami ¶a u j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn aŇčaŇčaŇčan u kiwkaj ku sakańß…ôm…ôkan i kitakidan, nika nina tukajan idaw ku jadańßaj nu duma u nar~…ĺimaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôa pu-u-kun u j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn u tadaaŇčaŇčaŇčan nu ji-su-puo-u-kun, tu mińßmińß ¶aan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a waŇčan nu tajdaaj a midaŇč, tur~…ĺu nu ¶a ¶ajan namakajdaaj namini i ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôa kanatar~…ĺ. **,*** pin-ńßun-kun- ¶…ô puo-u-kun pasupinaaj a ji-su- ¶ikuo, u sasar~…ĺusim…ôtan namaka ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a kitakidan nu kaw-ku-sja, nituktukan atu nar~…ĺimaan a tuudan. ti-siw-puo-u-kun itda i tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn, tada papad…ôŇčan u ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôa ji-su- ¶ia ¶i an-na.ti-siw a nar~…ĺimaan. . jiw-taj pipa ¶ukan a kakiniŇčan u j…ô-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôa a tad…ômaw ku katuudaj nu tatajdan miadińß, ir~…ĺabu idaw ku satabakiaj nu kitakidan a nikapapa ¶ukan a ¶udadan. puo-u-kun namakajda i jiw-taj nakamuan tu nipipa ¶ukan. nu duma a puo-u-kun nipisiŇčaan u r~…ĺar~…ĺimaan sa. tu mińßmkńß ¶aan nu kakiniŇčan nu nipipa ¶ukan idaw tu ku tajniaj mikiniŇč. jiw-taj-papa ¶ukan a kakiniŇčan u sapikinkiw atu sapakatin…ôŇč a ¶ikuo, nu tajniaj a tad…ômaw tan…ôŇč misuajaw tu jiw-taj sapipa ¶ukaw a kawaw mamidat…ôŇč sa. . sakaudip** itini i r~…ĺikisi, mir~…ĺijas ku j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn tu j…ôa-ńßua atu ¶ja-sa a aŇčaŇčanan nu minatu, sakaudip nu ńß…ôni namakajda namini i nipi ¶aw-s…ôn i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn a kikajan, ajda mańßida tu u namaka ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a tajniaj nu mi ¶aw-s…ônaj, ńßatidaaj tu nu tajniaj a tad…ômaw kan ¶a miadińß a ¶a tu si- ¶…ôn atu j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn a tukajan, nika namaka ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimpi ¶ mińß ¶aan, itini i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn sakaj sakaudip idaw t uku nika ¶akatan, ¶aj kaw kiwkaj a ¶a ¶aj ku tatajdaan sa. ***, .
S.FORM: == Ye-lu-sa-len ŤÄ∂Ť∑ĮśííŚÜ∑ == likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Ye-lu-sa-len u Pa-le-se-tan kitidaan nu macimacian, Ye-se'-lea tatengan mikuwan tinatukayan palanuheni a suo-tu, ina Lin-he-kuo mimelaway tu Pa-le-se-tan kanatal saan nu Walian u suo-tu nu nika kanatal. sumamaday nu O-cuo a tademaw palatatelungan nu kitakid. Ye-lu-sa-len itida i Ti-cun-hay atu Se-hay a laa'dan, u aayaw nu likisi a kitakid nu tatelungan nu kiwkay, u kapahay a nipidiputan tu Ya-puo-la-han nu sinza nu sakalahat a tukayan. Ye-lu-sa-len tawya u Ya-puo-la-han nu kiwkay a angangangan. namaka kunyen nu ayawan tu cacay a bataan nu seci, Suo-luo-men patideng tu sayaway a kiwkayan, Ye-lu-sa-len u Yiw-tay-cia tatelungan nu sasasinzaan atu sailayay a tukay, tawya sailayay nu kiwkay a liwan nu cabeng, u Yiw-tay-cia sa kapahay a kitidaan. kahemek nu sinza ku Ye-lu-sa-len, sakamusa "bangcalay a cudad" idaw ku sulit, itida ci Ye-su malabades, tademen, maudipaca, tayda i tapukuan. Yi-se-lan-ciw padadanan ku Ye-lu-sa-len malaMay-cia, May-ti-na tu nikuda a saka tulu a kahemekan nu kitidaan, sapikineng ci Mu-han-muo-de a saculil tu labii, patideng tu kahemekan nu kiwkay i buyu nu tusaay a Cin-cen-se, A-ke'-lun-Cin-cen-se atu Yun-teng-Cen-cen-se sapikineng tina kawawan. namaka caysiwlimpic mahcaan sakatulu nu nikalepacawan nu Cung-tun nikuda, mikuwan ku Yi-se-len tu hamin nu Ye-lu-sa-len kitidaan, pasutipan Ye-lu-sa-len atu wali Ye-lu-sa-len, atu malumanay a tukay. Yi-se-lea atu Pa-le-se-tan kanatal sakamusa u Ye-lu-sa-len u nuheni a Suo-tu sa, Yiw-tay tademaw, sinza atu Mu-se-lin palutatengan ina kitidaan u nuheni a sakahemekan nu kiwkay sa. nika ninatusaay a kanatal itini i kitakid nu siakayan caay namin palutatengan tu nu henian. Ťá™1967 . saan ku katuuday nida dukay caay henay kaw tatengaay, masasuwalay henay ku Yi-se-lea atu Pa-le-se-tan. Hatidaay nu kanatal u Yi-se-lea ta-se-kun itida namin patideng i Te'-la-wi-hu. aydaay nu Ye-lu-sa-len u Yi-Pa kalawlawan a tatelungan. Yi-se-lea a sin-cen-ci itida i Ye-lu-sa-len kitidaan, ahebal makaala tu limnemtu pinhua-kun-li, caycay kiya kenisa a niyadu', u Ye-lu-sa-len kenisa a kitidaan. . imi nu kiwkayŚģóśēôśĄŹÁĺ© Ye-lu-sa-len u Yiw-tay-cyaw, Ci-tu-cyaw atu Yi-se-lan-cyaw, tabakiay nu kasenengan nu kiwkay. satabakien ku imi Yi-se-lan-cyaw atu Ci-tu-cyaw tademaw milawit tu kitakid a pakiw nu tademawan, Ye-lu-sa-len sisa malakakaadihan nu kitakiday a angangangan. Ye-lu-sa-len itini nu tuluay a Ya-puo-la-han kiwkay u Yiw-tay-cyaw, Ci-tu-cyaw atu Yi-se-lan-cyaw atu nu duma a adidiay nu kiwkayan. Tusepsepsep mihcaan idaw ku nipikizang tu mihcaan, Ye-lu-sa-len idaw ku caytusepsip a kiwkayan, caylimwal kiwkay atu piclu ku Cin-cen-se. nika Ye-lu-sa-len u kiwkay atu kiwkay sakalecad namin, yadah ku lawlaw, picidekan u seng-ten-buyu'. . namaka nu ayawan nu cacay a lasubu a se-cian, Su-luo-men-sen-tin "sayaway a sen-tin" itida i Ye-lu-sa-len patideng, Ye-lu-sa-len u Yiw-tay-cyaw palutatengaan a tatelungan atu sakasenengan a tukay. Ye-lu-sa-len misuayaw tu sakasenengan tu Yiw-tay-cyaw mahida tu caay ka sumad. kalawpesan nu Ye-lu-sa-len i nu ayawan idaw ku nisingaan tu bangcalay a cudad, u sakaetiman nu Yiw-tay-cyaw, u Ta-se-ci a cacay ku situngusay a micumud cacay a mihcaan kina cacay a micumud. Ťá™ŚĺěŚČć10šłĖÁīÄ, . u tatama nu Yi-se-ley nu cacayay a mihcaan a kinatulu a micumud i Ye-lu-sa-len " Yi-ye-cey, Cu-pun-cey, U-cen-cey", nu kiwkay a demiad.ayda, pulung nu kitakid a Yiw-tay kiwkay anu minulitu kanca pasayda i Ye-lu-sa-len, anu idaw ku nisikian tu luma' pasayda i Ye-lu-sa-len, pasaydan i tatelungan a kitidaan, kun-yen pitu a bataan mihcaan kiwkay tastasen nu Luo-ma a tademaw, u liwan satu i midihingay i nutipana a buyu'an. nutipan, malasaka tusa a matastasay a kiwkayan, sisa malaYiw-tay-cyaw sakasenengan nu kiwkayan a kakitidaan. . Ciw-lu kasikadan nu Ye-lu-sa-len, caay kaimalumanay a cudadan ku sasakamuen, saan i Ye-lu-sa-len u kalabadesan ni Ye-su, pitademan atu kahukacean nida. saan ci Ye-su anu miinuli sadihemayen ku balucu' atu utunasi, " caay kay tiniay a buyu', caay kay Ye-lu-sa-len". saan i hukuingngay a cuda. lecuhan ci Ye-su pataydaen tu i Ye-lu-sa-len, sabaw tusa ku mihcaan ni Ye-su miladay tu wama atu wina tayda i Ye-lu-sa-len midiput tu E'-ye-cye, i kalabadesan mikasaw tu kiwkay. itida ci Ye-su i Ye-lu-sa-len, tiya demiadan, tu sadikuday nida pilipayan a maudip. micumud tu Ye-lu-sa-len ci Ye-su sadikuday nu nikalabiay a kitidaan i Si-an-san, midepit ci Ta-wi wan ku lunem. Ilabu nu Ye-lu-sa-len idaw ku "kalabadesan a dadan" atu "kalabadesan tu sabaw sepat a dadan", mikineng ci Ye-suan nipimuku tu ziwzika muculil pasayda i tatabata. . ya kitidaan u pipacekan ci Ye-su tu ziwzikaan, itida i aydaay a lunem nu kiwkay, u malumanay a tukay a angangangan a kiwkay atu kilisetu tataydaan a kitidaan. itini i Ye-han-hukuing inakitidaan u Ye-lu-sa-len sa, ayda nipikinkiwan tina ke-ke-kitidaan u laa'd tu Ye-lu-sa-len malumanay a cabengan caay kaw mibataday, itini tu i tukayan. ŚźĄŚźĄšĽĖ, . Ye-lu-sa-len saan u sakatulu nu Yi-se-lan-cyaw a sakatulu nu tabakiay a kiwkayan. itini i May-cya, ina Ye-lu-sa-len u Mu-se-lin nu inulian a kitidaan. itini i nemtusep mihcaan ci Mu-han-muo-de tapuku nu labii "Mu-se-lin palutatengan ci Mu-han-muo-de itida i labii mahicaay kiya a namakayda i May-cya katukuh i Ye-lu-sa-len kiwkay, macakat taydan i tapukuan, masasuadih atu maluayaway a tademawan" nikuda, Ye-lu-sa-len kuwanen tu nu Mu-se-lin. itini i "ku-lan-cuda" saan sabaw pitu a balih nu sakacacay nisulitan Mu-han-muo-de salabisa muculil pasayda i Ye-lu-sa-len a kawawan, aydaay a Ye-lu-sa-len sen-san i pabaw tusa ku Cin-cen-se idaw ku nipikiningan ci Ye-suan, hacacay sa i Ku-lan-cin nasakamuan u A-ke'-sa' cin-cen-se', u Mu-se-lin palutatengan ci Mu-han-muo-de salabisa mikayakay a sapikayakay a ba'tuan itida i yen-din-cin-cen-se. . lalangawanśĖáŚĆĖ amica u Ye-lu-sa-len angangangan u kiwkay ku sakahemekan i kitakidan, nika nina tukayan idaw ku yadahay nu duma u nalimaan a lalangawan. Yi-se-lea pu-u-kun u Ye-lu-sa-len u tadaangangangan nu yi-su-puo-u-kun, tu mihmihcaan makaala tu cacay a wangan nu taydaay a midang, tulu nu cacayan namakaydaay namini i Yi-se-lea kanatal. 80,000 pin-hun-kun-ce puo-u-kun pasupinaay a yi-su-cikuo, u sasalusimetan namakacuwacuwaay a kitakidan nu kaw-ku-sya, nituktukan atu nalimaan a tuudan. ti-siw-puo-u-kun itda i tatelungan nu Ye-lu-sa-len, tada papadengan u Yi-se-lea yi-su-cia ci An-na.Ti-siw a nalimaan. . Yiw-tay pipacukan a kakiningan u Ye-se-lea a tademaw ku katuuday nu tataydan miadih, ilabu idaw ku satabakiay nu kitakidan a nikapapacukan a cudadan. puo-u-kun namakayda i Yiw-tay nakamuan tu nipipacukan. nu duma a puo-u-kun nipisingaan u lalimaan sa. tu mihmkhcaan nu kakiningan nu nipipacukan idaw tu ku tayniay mikining. Yiw-tay-papacukan a kakiningan u sapikinkiw atu sapakatineng a cikuo, nu tayniay a tademaw taneng misuayaw tu Yiw-tay sapipacukaw a kawaw mamidateng sa. . sakaudipÁ∂ďśŅü itini i likisi, miliyas ku Ye-lu-sa-len tu Yea-hua atu Cya-sa a anganganan nu minatu, sakaudip nu heni namakayda namini i nipicaw-sen i Ye-lu-sa-len a kikayan, ayda mahida tu u namakacuwacuwaay a tayniay nu micaw-senay, hatidaay tu nu tayniay a tademaw kanca miadih aca tu si-ceyn atu Ye-lu-sa-len a tukayan, nika namaka caysiwlimpic mihcaan, itini i Ye-lu-sa-len sakay sakaudip idaw t uku nikacakatan, cay kaw kiwkay a cacay ku tataydaan sa. ś≠∑ŚŹ≤šłä, .

i nutipana a buju Ē~ °an. nutipan, mar~…ĺasaka tusa a matastasaj a kiwkajan, sisa mar~…ĺajiw-taj- ¶jaw sakas…ôn…ôŇčan nu kiwkajan a kakitidaan. . ¶iw-r~…ĺu kasikadan nu j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn, ¶aaj kaimar~…ĺumanaj a ¶udadan ku sasakamu…ôn, saan i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn u kar~…ĺabad…ôsan ni j…ô-su, pitad…ôman atu kańßuka ¶…ôan nida. saan ¶i j…ô-su anu miinur~…ĺi sadińß…ômaj…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° atu utunasi, " ¶aaj kaj tiniaj a buju Ē~ °, ¶aaj kaj j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn". saan i ńßukuiŇčŇčaj a ¶uda. r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶i j…ô-su patajda…ôn tu i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn, sabaw tusa ku mińß ¶aan ni j…ô-su mir~…ĺadaj tu wama atu wina tajda i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn midiput tu …ô Ē~ °-j…ô- ¶j…ô, i kar~…ĺabad…ôsan mikasaw tu kiwkaj. itida ¶i j…ô-su i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn, tija d…ômiadan, tu sadikudaj nida "kar~…ĺabad…ôsan a dadan" atu "kar~…ĺabad…ôsan tu sabaw s…ôpat a dadan", mikin…ôŇč ¶i j…ô-suan nipimuku tu ziwzika mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ pasajda i tatabata. . ja kitidaan u pipa ¶…ôkan ¶i j…ô-su tu r~…ĺabii "mu-s…ô-r~…ĺin par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ¶i mu-ńßan-muo-d…ô itida i r~…ĺabii mańßi ¶aaj kija a namakajda i maj- ¶ja katukuńß i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn kiwkaj, ma ¶akat tajdan i tapukuan, masasuadińß atu mar~…ĺuajawaj a tad…ômawan" nikuda, j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn kuwan…ôn tu nu mu-s…ô-r~…ĺin. itini i "ku-r~…ĺan- ¶uda" saan sabaw pitu a bar~…ĺińß nu saka ¶a ¶aj nisur~…ĺitan mu-ńßan-muo-d…ô sar~…ĺabisa mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ pasajda i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn a kawawan, ajdaaj a j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn s…ôn-san i pabaw tusa ku ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô idaw ku nipikiniŇčan ¶i j…ô-suan, ńßa ¶a ¶aj sa i ku-r~…ĺan- ¶in nasakamuan u a-k…ô Ē~ °-sa Ē~ ° ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô Ē~ °, u mu-s…ô-r~…ĺin par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ¶i mu-ńßan-muo-d…ô sar~…ĺabisa mikajakaj a sapikajakaj a ba Ē~ °tuan itida i j…ôn-din- ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô. . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan** ami ¶a u j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn aŇčaŇčaŇčan u kiwkaj ku sakańß…ôm…ôkan i kitakidan, nika nina tukajan idaw ku jadańßaj nu duma u nar~…ĺimaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôa pu-u-kun u j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn u tadaaŇčaŇčaŇčan nu ji-su-puo-u-kun, tu mińßmińß ¶aan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a waŇčan nu tajdaaj a midaŇč, tur~…ĺu nu ¶a ¶ajan namakajdaaj namini i ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôa kanatar~…ĺ. **,*** pin-ńßun-kun- ¶…ô puo-u-kun pasupinaaj a ji-su- ¶ikuo, u sasar~…ĺusim…ôtan namaka ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a kitakidan nu kaw-ku-sja, nituktukan atu nar~…ĺimaan a tuudan. ti-siw-puo-u-kun itda i tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn, tada papad…ôŇčan u ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôa ji-su- ¶ia ¶i an-na.ti-siw a nar~…ĺimaan. . jiw-taj pipa ¶ukan a kakiniŇčan u j…ô-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôa a tad…ômaw ku katuudaj nu tatajdan miadińß, ir~…ĺabu idaw ku satabakiaj nu kitakidan a nikapapa ¶ukan a ¶udadan. puo-u-kun namakajda i jiw-taj nakamuan tu nipipa ¶ukan. nu duma a puo-u-kun nipisiŇčaan u r~…ĺar~…ĺimaan sa. tu mińßmkńß ¶aan nu kakiniŇčan nu nipipa ¶ukan idaw tu ku tajniaj mikiniŇč. jiw-taj-papa ¶ukan a kakiniŇčan u sapikinkiw atu sapakatin…ôŇč a ¶ikuo, nu tajniaj a tad…ômaw tan…ôŇč misuajaw tu jiw-taj sapipa ¶ukaw a kawaw mamidat…ôŇč sa. . sakaudip** itini i r~…ĺikisi, mir~…ĺijas ku j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn tu j…ôa-ńßua atu ¶ja-sa a aŇčaŇčanan nu minatu, sakaudip nu ńß…ôni namakajda namini i nipi ¶aw-s…ôn i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn a kikajan, ajda mańßida tu u namaka ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a tajniaj nu mi ¶aw-s…ônaj, ńßatidaaj tu nu tajniaj a tad…ômaw kan ¶a miadińß a ¶a tu si- ¶…ôn atu j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn a tukajan, nika namaka ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimpi ¶ mińß ¶aan, itini i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn sakaj sakaudip idaw t uku nika ¶akatan, ¶aj kaw kiwkaj a ¶a ¶aj ku tatajdaan sa. ***, .
